name: Pegasus Hava Tasimaciligi Anonim Sirketi
summary: Pegasus Hava Tasimaciligi Anonim Sirketi, together with its subsidiaries, provides airline services. It provides high-frequency services on short- and medium-haul, point-to-point, and transit routes on its domestic and international network. The company also offers charter flight services, as well as cargo and simulated flight training services. As of December 31, 2019, it offered scheduled passenger services on 35 domestic routes in Turkey, as well as 76 international routes to European, CIS, and the Middle Eastern and African destinations; and operated a fleet of 84 aircraft. The company was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Istanbul, Turkey. Pegasus Hava Tasimaciligi Anonim Sirketi is a subsidiary of Esas Holding A.S.
